issues.description: Effect is incomplete. DSL only includes trashing the character but omits the core effect: 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of the deck in any order.' Missing SearchDeck or equivalent action to reveal/manipulate deck.
TrashFromHand is incorrect. The card text says 'trash this Character' (referring to the card on board), not from hand. Should be KO (removing from board) or a self-trash mechanism, not TrashFromHand.
Missing conditional: The trash action should be optional ('You may trash'). Current DSL lacks an optional/conditional wrapper or condition flag.

thenActions.description: Look at 5 cards from top of deck and place at top or bottom in any order
